purpose: QuickActions participates in the Git workspace. It presents repository status, branch/history/diff/commit/remote operations through the Electron git IPC API so the renderer never shells out directly or assumes one fixed repository.
gotchas: Git operations route through Electron IPC and are scoped to selected repository paths; UI components should not call git directly.
patterns: Functional React component with hooks for local state/effects and Electron API calls isolated behind window.electronAPI.
Page-directory organization separates high-level page shells from nested component, style, and index modules.
conventions: Renderer components use .jsx extensions, PascalCase component names, and @ alias imports for src/ui modules.
